series_metadata.series_description: All grant records concerning Federal grants to Plant Pest Control Division including grant application forms, financial status reports, expenditures, and employee hours tracked against the work plan.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The originals are scanned into the PPC drive and will be retained for 3 years electronically. ; Paper: The original document will be scanned and the paper copy will be retained until the document is verified readable in our PPC drive; once the paper copy is verified readable it will be put in the waste paper., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
